headline: Why SYM Stock Beats A Bond At Its Own Game
summary: The market is pricing this robotics company like a high-yield bond, ignoring one crucial fact about its payout.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Rockwell Automation, Raises Price Target to $555
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Rockwell Automation (NYSE:ROK) with a Buy and raises the price target from $500 to $555.
